title: Vietnamese Crab Bun Soup
description: A flavorful and spicy soup made with crab, bun, and rieu, perfect for a cold winter day.

ingredients.name: Crab meat
ingredients.notes: Fresh crab meat from the market

ingredients.name: Tasty fish sauce
ingredients.notes: Fish sauce with garlic and chili

ingredients.name: Briny fish sauce
ingredients.notes: Fish sauce with fish and salt

instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add onion and sauté until softened.
Add garlic and sauté for another minute.
Add rieu paste and sauté for 1 minute.
Add crab meat and stir to combine.
Add fish sauces, water, and stir to combine.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low.
Add bun and cook for another 5 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
